name: createScreenImage
signature: createScreenImage(QString id, QString filename, qreal x, qreal y, qreal scale, bool visible, qreal alpha, float fadeDuration)
description:
Creates and displays an image on the screen at the specified coordinates. The image is loaded from a file in the 'scripts/' directory and can be animated, moved, scaled, and faded. If an image with the same ID already exists, it will be replaced.

IMPORTANT: The scale parameter affects the final resolution of the image! Using scale < 1 reduces resolution (but saves memory), while scale > 1 creates upsampling artifacts. For animations that grow/shrink an image, consider creating at scale=1 and using setImageScale() for animated transitions instead.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the image (used to reference it later)

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Image file name (placed in scripts/ folder). Supports PNG, JPG, GIF, BMP formats.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: X-coordinate (pixels) from the left edge of the screen

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Y-coordinate (pixels) from the top edge of the screen

parameters.name: scale
parameters.description: Scale factor (1.0 = original size, 0.5 = 50% size, 2.0 = double size). Affects resolution!

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: Initial visibility state (true = visible, false = hidden)

parameters.name: alpha
parameters.description: Initial opacity (0.0 = fully transparent, 1.0 = fully opaque). This is the maximum opacity when visible.

parameters.name: fadeDuration
parameters.description: Duration in seconds for fade in/out animations (applies to showImage toggles and setImageAlpha changes when the image is visible)

name: getShowImage
description: Returns whether a screen image is currently visible (opacity > 0). Returns false if the image does not exist or is hidden.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the image

returnDescription: true if the image is visible, false if hidden or not found

name: showImage
description: Shows or hides a screen image. The image will fade in/out according to its fadeDuration setting.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the image

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: true to show the image, false to hide it

name: getImageWidth
description: Returns the current scaled width of the image in pixels. The width reflects the current scale factor applied to the original image.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the image

returnDescription: Image width in pixels, or 0 if the image does not exist

name: getImageHeight
description: Returns the current scaled height of the image in pixels. The height reflects the current scale factor applied to the original image.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the image

returnDescription: Image height in pixels, or 0 if the image does not exist
example:
var height = ScreenImageMgr.getImageHeight("logo");
core.debug("Logo height: " + height + " pixels");

name: getImageScaleX
description: Returns the current horizontal scale factor of the image. A value of 1.0 means the image is at its original width.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the image

name: getImageScaleY
description: Returns the current vertical scale factor of the image. A value of 1.0 means the image is at its original height.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the image

example:
var scaleY = ScreenImageMgr.getImageScaleY("logo");
core.debug("Vertical scale: " + scaleY);

name: setImageScale
signature: setImageScale(QString id, qreal scaleX, qreal scaleY, float duration)
description:
Sets the scale of an image, optionally animating the resize over a specified duration. Useful for creating zoom-in or zoom-out effects.

Note: For best quality when scaling up, use smooth transformation (enabled by default). When scaling down, the image may lose detail.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the image

parameters.name: scaleX
parameters.description: New horizontal scale factor (1.0 = original size, >1 = enlarge, <1 = shrink)

parameters.name: scaleY
parameters.description: New vertical scale factor (1.0 = original size, >1 = enlarge, <1 = shrink)

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Duration in seconds for the scale animation (0 = instant change)

name: setImageAlpha
description:
Sets the maximum opacity (alpha) of a screen image. This value determines the opacity when the image is visible. If the image is currently visible, it will fade to the new alpha value smoothly according to its fadeDuration.

Note: 0.0 = fully transparent (invisible), 1.0 = fully opaque (solid).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the image

parameters.name: alpha
parameters.description: Opacity value (0.0 = fully transparent, 1.0 = fully opaque)

name: setImageXY
signature: setImageXY(QString id, qreal x, qreal y, float duration)
description: Moves an image to a specific screen position. The movement can be animated over a specified duration. Coordinates are measured in pixels from the top-left corner of the screen.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the image

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: New X-coordinate (pixels from left edge)

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: New Y-coordinate (pixels from top edge)

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Duration in seconds for the movement animation (0 = instant, default: 0)

name: addImageXY
signature: addImageXY(QString id, qreal x, qreal y, float duration)
description: Moves an image by adding offsets to its current position. Useful for relative movements without needing to calculate absolute positions.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the image

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: X offset in pixels (positive = right, negative = left)

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Y offset in pixels (positive = down, negative = up)

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Duration in seconds for the movement animation (0 = instant, default: 0)

name: deleteImage
description: Permanently removes a screen image from memory. The image will no longer be displayed or accessible. Any pending animations are stopped.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the image to delete

name: deleteAllImages
description: Removes all screen images from memory. Useful for cleaning up at the end of a presentation or script, or before loading a new set of images.

name: getAllImageIDs
description: Returns a list of all currently loaded image identifiers. Useful for iterating through images, checking existence, or debugging.
returnDescription: List of all image IDs (empty list if no images loaded)
